metadata.name: SuperTeam
metadata.description: Seven-stage delivery plugin with main-session-as-orchestrator architecture and hook-enforced trust chain

plugins.name: superteam
plugins.description: V4.7 main-session-as-orchestrator with V4.7.1 closeout fixes: active-subagent window now opens only for superteam:* specialists (non-SuperTeam subagents no longer give the main session a write bypass), corrupt/unknown-schema mode.json triggers a loud warning instead of a silent fall-through, and the missing /superteam:bypass slash command is now provided. Repo-root metadata (CLAUDE.md, README.md, VERSION.md) is back in sync with the active plugin version.
